substep.title: Check for Existing State
substep.action: Check if {bundle_dir}/pr-cycle-state.md exists. - If yes: this is a resumption. Load `iteration_count`, `last_action_time`, `pr_number`, `pr_url` from frontmatter. Skip step 2 (PR is already open). Proceed to step 3. - If no: this is a first invocation. Initialize: - iteration_count = 0 - last_action_time = current ISO 8601 timestamp - pr_number = null (assigned in step 2) - context_warning_received = false

substep.title: Capture Bundle Context
